regenerationPlan.expectedResult: Repair plan and public boundary are verified before source data changes.

regenerationPlan.command: Run the CP26 snapshot refresh generators only after source/provenance metadata is repaired.
regenerationPlan.expectedResult: Snapshot manifests and checksums reflect repaired references.

regenerationPlan.expectedResult: Unresolved reference and blocker deltas are visible in graph and vault pointers.

regenerationPlan.expectedResult: Candidate selection remains gate-driven and evidence routes carry complete operational refs.
Selected-candidate unlock deltas are measured without escalation leakage.

unlockBoundary.reason: CP29-R02 is a repair plan only. Actual repair, regeneration, diff proof, quality review, and escalation separation must happen before unlock.

publicBoundary.message: CP29-R02 plans private reference/provenance repair only. Public release remains blocked and public-safe counts remain zero.
